summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Alberto Filgueiras sports psychologist website. All 22 requested features verified and passing. The site correctly implements black/green theme, content updates (20 years, new hero text, country flags), photo carousel, YouTube embeds, WhatsApp integration, and removal of course-related content.
critical_code_review_comments: All data is MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mock.js - no real backend implementation
Contact form submission shows toast but doesn't actually send data anywhere
Login form is non-functional (just shows toast, no actual authentication)
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only prototype website. All data is mocked. Backend is not implemented. The following features were verified: 1) Hero shows 'Alberto Filgueiras PhD' with correct subtitle, 2) Stats show 20+ years and country flags, 3) Features section shows 'Treinamento Mental e Excelência Emocional', 4) Equilíbrio card exists, 5) Photo carousel with 5 images works, 6) Credentials card shows CRP 05/43557 and AFC, 7) All WhatsApp buttons link to wa.me/610415661366, 8) No course links in header/footer, 9) /cursos route doesn't exist, 10) About page has black/green theme with 3 YouTube embeds, 6 education entries, 8 institution badges, 11) Services page has black/green theme, 12) Contact page has black/green theme with no email, 13) Login page has dark theme, 14) Footer shows 20 anos and no email.
